memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Thomas Wyndham Biography
memoryArtifacts.description:
Son and heir of Sir John Wyndham of Felbrigg by his first wife Lady Mary Howard Wyndham.

Thomas was relieved from the penalties attached to the son of an attainted man and was allowed to succeed his …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Wyndham於1468年出生在英國藍卡爾博爾頓時，他的父親Sir John Wyndham25歲，母親Lady Margaret Howard24歲。他於1496年與Eleanor Scrope在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1521年12月22日在英國諾福爾可費爾布利格享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Wyndham于1468年出生在英国藍卡爾博爾頓时，他的父亲Sir John Wyndham25岁，母亲Lady Margaret Howard24岁。他于1496年与Eleanor Scrope在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1521年12月22日在英国諾福爾可費爾布利格享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wyndham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Windham  .

variants.name: Windham
meanings: English: habitational name usually from the Norfolk placename Wymondham, which is locally pronounced /wɪndəm/. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’. By various marriages in the 16th century the Wyndham family of Felbrigg Hall, Norfolk, acquired estates in North Yorkshire and Somerset, for which reason the manor of Orchard in the parish of Watchet, came to be known as Orchard Wyndham in the early 17th century. Later descendants became earls of Egremont, whose estates included Petworth in Sussex. This and other marital acquistions probably explain the post-medieval presence of the surname in Somerset, Devon, Dorset, Wiltshire, Gloucestershire, northern England, and perhaps also (from the late 17th century) in Sussex and Kent. In 1741 Percy Wyndham of the Orchard family inherited the earldom of Thomond, in Ireland, which may account for the currency of the name in Connaght (see 4 below).

English: habitational name perhaps occasionally from Wymondham in Leicestershire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund (genitive Wīgmundes) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.
English: habitational name from Wyndham in Shermanbury (Sussex). The placename derives from an Old English personal name Winda + Old English hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Wyndham was born in 1468, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John Wyndham, was 25 and his mother, Lady Margaret Howard, was 24. He married Eleanor Scrope in 1496, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 December 1521, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Wyndham est né en 1468, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wyndham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Howard, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Scrope en 1496, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1521, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1496 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1521 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wyndham è nato il nel 1468 nel Bolton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Wyndham, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Howard, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Scrope nel 1496, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 dicembre 1521, nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wyndhamが1468年にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Wyndhamは25歳，母Lady Margaret Howardは24歳であった。1496年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでEleanor Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1521年12月22日にイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチノーウィチ カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, , Norfolk, E: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wyndham(이)가 1468년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wyndham(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Howard(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Eleanor Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1521년 12월 22일 영국 노르폴크 프브리그에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wyndham nasceu em 1468, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Wyndham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Howard, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Scrope em 1496, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1521, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, , Norfolk, E: норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Wyndham родился в 1468 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wyndham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Howard, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Scrope в 1496 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 декабря 1521 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Eleanor Scrope en 1496, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1521, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
